match.userMessage:
9-panel cinematic storyboard sheet derived from Image 1. Mix Wide, Medium, and Tight shots of the same scene. No borders between panels.

Layout: 3x3 grid (9 panels) in a 16:9 landscape image.

Scene: Modern social-first product photography still of SCARLETT wearing a linen shirt standing in knee-deep surf at Bondi Beach turning toward camera mid-laugh as a larger foaming wave rolls in around her calves, potential energy in her stance with incoming water and sea spray, wet pale sand stretching into turquoise ocean under rolling whitecaps, low afternoon sun creating warm highlights across the surface and gentle lens flare, textured coastal environment with natural driftwood fragments and subtle wind-swept details in the background, bright natural daylight with crisp directional shadows and airy high-key color grading, eye-level handheld framing with shallow depth of field focusing on the figure against the dynamic surf, clean true-to-life tones with one coral accent pop, energetic yet serene final moment

Match Image 1 exactly: same character(s) (face, hair, skin, clothing), lighting, color grade, and texture. If character reference sheets are provided, use them for likeness — do not render them as separate panels.

No text, dialogue bubbles, scene numbers, or watermarks.


  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [PRIMARY SOURCE]: Primary source scene — generate 9 variant shots from this image
    - Image 2 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 3 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BONDI BEACH - FINAL WAVE - Knee-deep surf with incoming wave
    
    IMPORTANT: Character, location, and element reference images are for IDENTITY CONSISTENCY ONLY. Do NOT reproduce them as separate panels or subjects. Elements (logos, products) must render faithfully when referenced but should appear naturally within the scene. All output panels must depict the scene from the PRIMARY SOURCE image.
  </reference-images>
